title: Method of user equipment, method of network node, user equipment, and network node
abstract: An aspect of this disclosure includes a method of a User Equipment (UE). The method includes performing a PDU Session Establishment procedure related to 5G Femtocell.
claims: Claims ( 10 ) ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂA method of a User Equipment (UE) comprising: ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂperforming a PDU Session Establishment procedure related to 5G Femtocell. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂA method of a network node comprising: ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂperforming a PDU Session Establishment procedure related to 5G Femtocell. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂThe method according to claim 2, wherein the network node is a core network node. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂThe method according to claim 3, wherein the core network node is a User Plane Function (UPF) node. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂThe method according to claim 4, wherein the UPF node is located at a private premise network. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂA User Equipment (UE) comprising: ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂmeans for performing a PDU Session Establishment procedure related to 5G Femtocell. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂA network node comprising: ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂmeans for performing a PDU Session Establishment procedure related to 5G Femtocell. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂThe network node according to claim 7, wherein the network node is a core network node. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂThe network node according to claim 8, wherein the core network node is a User Plane Function (UPF) node. ГЈВЂВЂГЈВЂВЂThe network node according to claim 9, wherein the UPF node is located at a private premise network.
